name: Stuffed Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz.) package of frozen chopped spinach (thawed and drained)
2 cups ricotta cheese (or small curd cottage cheese)
6 ounces fresh mushrooms, sliced and sautéed
3 slices of moist bread, torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the manicotti and drain.
2. Mix together onion, spinach, bouillon, garlic, thyme, ricotta, beaten eggs, Parmesan cheese, and half of the mushrooms.
3. Fill the manicotti shells with the spinach mixture.
4. Arrange the stuffed shells in a greased 9x13 baking dish.
5. Pour tomato sauce over the manicotti and add the remaining mushrooms.
6. Sprinkle with oregano and cover with Mozzarella cheese.
7. Cover and bake at 350 degrees until hot and bubbly, about 25 minutes.
Alternately:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet and drain.
2. Mix the browned meat with all other ingredients.
3. Stuff the manicotti with the meat mixture.
4. Follow steps 3-7 from above.
